title: rhododendron chrysolepis
intro: Rhododendron chrysolepis, also known as the alpine azalea, is a species of flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of rhododendron chrysolepis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
